fields.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Create tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh with a single structural boundary test (Rule 5 compliant) that FAILS RED before consumer_completeness is added to scope.md.

The test is a SINGLE function checking BOTH count assertions (so only one RED marker is needed in .test-index):

- test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts: assert BOTH:
  (a) dimension table rows count = 4 (grep '^| [a-z_]' — currently 3, RED)
  (b) indented JSON schema keys count = 4 (grep '^\s\+"[a-z_]*":' — currently 3, RED)
  Fails if EITHER count is wrong; reports both actual counts on failure

Rule 5 compliance: count-based structural boundary checks only, NOT body-text content assertions.

IMPORTANT grep pattern distinction:
- WRONG: grep -c '"[a-z_]*":' scope.md → yields 4 (includes 'dimensions:' wrapper at col 0)
- WRONG: grep -c '^\s*"[a-z_]*":' scope.md → yields 4 (^\s* matches 0+ spaces, includes wrapper)
- CORRECT: grep -c '^\s\+"[a-z_]*":' scope.md → yields 3 (^\s+ requires 1+ spaces, excludes wrapper)

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh following pattern of test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
2. Single test function test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts():
   - Count lines matching '^| [a-z_]' in SCOPE_MD; store as table_count
   - Count lines matching '^\s\+"[a-z_]*":' in SCOPE_MD; store as json_count
   - If table_count=4 AND json_count=4: pass
   - Otherwise: fail with message showing actual counts (e.g., 'table rows: 3/4, json keys: 3/4')
3. chmod +x the new test file
4. Update .test-index: APPEND to line 316 ONLY (line 249 is an intentional historical duplicate — do NOT modify it):
   Before: plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md:tests/scripts/test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh,tests/scripts/test-isolation-rule-no-unscoped-export.sh
   After:  plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md:tests/scripts/test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh,tests/scripts/test-isolation-rule-no-unscoped-export.sh,tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh [test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts]
5. Verify bash tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exits non-zero (RED)

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh: create (new test file)
- .test-index: modify line 316 (append to comma-separated list, add RED marker [test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts])

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: [ -x tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh ]
- [ ] test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts function exists (single function checking both counts)
  Verify: grep -q 'test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts' tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
- [ ] .test-index has exactly 2 entries for scope.md (line 249 untouched, appended to line 316)
  Verify: grep -c 'scope.md:' .test-index | grep -q '^2$'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker uses correct function name [test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts]
  Verify: grep -q 'test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh \[test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts\]' .test-index
- [ ] RED confirmation: test file exits non-zero before scope.md changes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
